svg.title: RTAM Foundation — Devanagari wordmark (Sanskritic register)
svg.desc: Devanagari Foundation wordmark in the pure Sanskritic register: ऋतम् (name) + प्रतिष्ठान (pratiṣṭhāna, established institution). Default Devanagari register for sacred, scholarly, trust-deed contexts. No bindu — ऋ is self-contained.
